sections.content:
World model (revised):
- Lower white region maxed at cols 0-19, pair stuck at cols 20-21/22-25.
- Target at cols 28-29, pair can't reach it.
- Middle white region contracted to nothing.
- Hypothesis: Need to expand middle region to increase lower region's max.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Try expanding middle region by clicking second blue
predict(expect_change=True, note='Expand middle region to increase lower region max')
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 25, 'col': 2}
])

print("Result:", last_action_result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation

print("\n=== ALL RELEVANT ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'c') and n['pixels'] < 50:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} pixels={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 100:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  White: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} pixels={n['pixels']}")

if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('done'):
    print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
elif last_action_result.get('game_over'):
    print("Game over")
else:
    print("Level active")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
